match.userMessage:
9-panel cinematic storyboard sheet derived from Image 1. Mix Wide, Medium, and Tight shots of the same scene. No borders between panels.

Layout: 3x3 grid (9 panels) in a 16:9 landscape image.

Scene: Locked macro still life photograph of a coral lipstick standing upright on a pale tile shelf beside a clear glass of water and a single white flower, captured in a minimal bright studio bathroom with crisp white surfaces, marble accents, and soft green highlights throughout, direct on-camera flash creating sharp highlights and clean directional shadows that emphasize the product's shape against the neutral backdrop, high-key airy natural window light mixed with punchy flash for editorial energy, shallow depth of field with crisp focus on the central objects and gentle background blur, modern social-first product photography aesthetic with tactile real-life context and clean color-matched minimal arrangement

Match Image 1 exactly: same character(s) (face, hair, skin, clothing), lighting, color grade, and texture. If character reference sheets are provided, use them for likeness — do not render them as separate panels.

No text, dialogue bubbles, scene numbers, or watermarks.


  <reference-images>
    - Image 1 [PRIMARY SOURCE]: Primary source scene — generate 9 variant shots from this image
    - Image 2 [LOCATION REF]: INT. BONDI STUDIO - Minimal bright studio space featuring a crisp white vanity with marble surface
    
    IMPORTANT: Character, location, and element reference images are for IDENTITY CONSISTENCY ONLY. Do NOT reproduce them as separate panels or subjects. Elements (logos, products) must render faithfully when referenced but should appear naturally within the scene. All output panels must depict the scene from the PRIMARY SOURCE image.
  </reference-images>
